item.title: Images of Note: Road Roller
item.description:
This man exudes chaos
oh no
This is your daily reminder that the pro-"life" movement want more teen pregnancies because teen mothers become cheap labour.
Considering I am having back issues rn, this meme hits home
If your powers have horrific uses, they're not stupid.
Hell yeah
D:
Batman really is a dramatic furry
fuck you, corporate Goblins.
I agree, Reggie is aggressively neurodivergent.
I need to make a powerpoint about Cycloped.
Oh my God
jirt
This is outrageous. Bring back the Swag. They even took away the barrel of rum.
SPACE BUTTPLUG
(Crush me, space mommy)
We have several local characters.
I love this picture. This man looks like a JoJo Character, the fit, the bod, the drink. Even the "single btw". The girls giving him side eye? He's not doing it for them. He's the definition of Serving Cunt.
this is why I put Sebastian in a maid dress.
bug
That's adorable
This is basically cat owners.
GRAB HIS DICK AND TWIST IT
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also I'm gonna stream tonight: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.dc:creator: nicknac241

item.title: I Tried: Painting Toothless
item.description:
How To Train Your Dragon is one of those movies that had almost no right to be as good as it was. It strayed almost entirely from the premise of the books and was still wonderful. I want a Toothless of my own. If only a painted version. I think technically he can't fly without Hiccup, but I don't paint people so this can be an AU or something.
This was maybe not the best use of space on a huge canvas, but I love him.
item.dc:creator: LadyVimes

item.title: Yayyyyyy!!!!!
item.description: After all the horror stories I've been told and read that you always get turned away if you're not old enough or you don't have kids, I was told yes! No babies for meeeeee! God, it's such a relief! Note: I used the phrase getting my tubes tied since it's colloquial, but they're actually just removing the tubes entirely. Weeeee!
item.dc:creator: Thisisallyourfault

item.title: A random dump of Unmuted vids I've saved throughout the years
item.description:
The complete scene: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kAc5y3bQfyY
The full tape from 1986 (featuring an appearance by friend Jon Lovitz) - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uvQjTb9NH6o
Celine Dion at the 1998 Oscars, singing "My Heart Will Go On" from TITANIC https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gVI65It0Ucw
Pocahontas - Colors of the Wind (Several Indigenous American languages) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pYV8RPAyX3A
Source [video by /u/PeerTijd]: https://www.reddit.com/r/clonewars/comments/g8nmmx/duel_of_the_fates_x_ahsoka_vs_maul_headphones/
Source is Lava Bladez: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/eQaBNEIE2Bw
No Doubt (Gwen Stefani) - Just a Girl
Christmas in Conneticut, from 1945
Weird Al Yankovic - Money for Nothing (Beverly Hills)
Ofra Haza - Deliever Us
from The Carol Burnett Show (1967 - 1978)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2xD7QCSjkBc
from "Maid Marian and Her Merry Men" (1989)
"Westaboo" is what they be called (a kind of reversal of American "Weebs" who love Japanese culture)
"The Hammers of Justice are UNISEX!" [from The Real Adventures of Jonny Quest, Wayback in 1996]
Source [by eli_handle_b․wav] - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rr7yuuaLmR8
Also made by @QuicklyThisWay
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Saj65ySCOSo https://www.instagram.com/usha_jey/
Billy Joel - Uptown Girl
The vid comes from Youtuber Daniel LaBelle
20 years later she returned to Star Trek in Season 2 of the series "Picard", as the BORG QUEEN. For what would turn out to be one of her final roles. Almost poetic, in sad way.
Adriano Celentano - Prisencolinensinainciusol
Sauce: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rD85692mtV0
The original - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DedaEVIbTkY Re-released in a new remix posthumously after his death in 1992 - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HTdd8QxifbY
Billy Joel - Piano Man
Weird Al Yankovic - Fat
Dead or Alive - You Spin Me Round (Like a Record)
Sertab Erener - Everyway That I Can (Turkey) 2003
Together with Cynthia Rothrock, also her first ever film starring role
Carly Simon - You're So Vain
How Superheroes settle their differences
@Chelseathedog
[Art by the.ogarno] [Music from The Adventures of Brisco County Jr.]
MISTER ED plays baseball against the 1963 Los Angeles Dodgers [Sandy Koufax, Willie Davis, Johnny Roseboro, Moose Skowron, etc]
A bunch of turtles sunning on an unstable river log
Black wolves are rare for this area of Minnesota, especially among the 19 packs being studied by the Voyageurs Wolf Project - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0sXwTKwLZ2A
Natalie Imbruglia - Torn
Weird Al Yankovic - Like a Surgeon
After getting lost while looking for the Indes... and landed instead in Hispaniola. Didn't stop him from raping and enslaving and killing the locals he DID find.
Ozzy Osbourne - Crazy Train

item.title: Banana Day
item.description: Teehee!!!! Happy banana day! Unironically, bananas are my favourite fruit. I put it in everything, muffins, ice cream, smoothies, porridge….WHATEVEER!!! Bananas are so good. So…enjoy a banana today! If you’d like to support me: Extra https://www.patreon.com/miaormoa Dono and commissions: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Michael J. Fox (Not dead, just loved)
item.dc:creator: TheArtistFormerlyKnownAsTheBabyAteMyDingo

item.title: Joe Louis: "What Day Do We Play?"
item.description: JOE LOUIS PORTRAIT By Carl Van Vechten - Van Vechten Collection at Library of Congress, Public Domain, https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=616866  “Joseph Louis Barrow (May 13, 1914 – April 12, 1981) was an American professional boxer who competed from 1934 to 1951. Nicknamed ‘the Brown Bomber’, Louis is widely regarded as one of the greatest and most influential boxers of all time. He reigned as the world heavyweight champion from 1937 until his temporary retirement in 1949. He was victorious in 25 consecutive title defenses, a record for all weight classes. Louis had the longest single reign as champion of any boxer in history. “Louis’s cultural impact was felt well outside the ring. He is widely regarded as the first African-American to achieve the status of a nationwide hero within the United States, and was also a focal point of anti-Nazi sentiment leading up to and during World War II because of his historic rematch with German boxer Max Schmeling in 1938. He was instrumental in integrating the game of golf, helping break the sport’s color barrier in America by appearing under a sponsor’s exemption in a PGA event in 1952.” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Joe_Louis  Check Out: Source: Norma Miller, Swingin’ at the Savoy. With Evette Jensen. Philadelphia, PA: Temple University Press, 1996., pp. 196-198. “Every man’s got to figure to get beat sometime.” — Joe Louis “I don’t like money, actually, but it quiets my nerves.” — Joe Louis “Everybody wants to go to heaven, but nobody wants to die.” — Joe Louis ” Once that bell rings you’re on your own.” — Joe Louis
item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: And you Americans say corporations aren't racist
item.dc:creator: Nightguyxmadara

item.title: It’s my cake day! Here’s a lil dump to celebrate
item.description:
I know guac is extra but so am I ✨
Me going through my phone to find these, then organize them into a compelling story about my life
About sums me up
I love my job and I hate how much I love it sometimes
Cheat code
Dis me mostly
And then this me when I go outside
I def am eating string cheese today. I like cooking… but really like eating
I’m also very single.
Despite all the things like depression, anxiety, loneliness, etc - imma still be great
Since its my cake day Im sweet like a treat
Join me
Grab a drink
And grab your gold star for joining me on my special day! EDIT - most viral! Yay! I feel honored to join the worst of you ?
item.dc:creator: txpsu2012

item.title: Today I decided to try my hand at embroidering this!
item.description: Edit: Woohoo! Most Viral! Thanks for the love, Imgur! I'm an embroidery artist based in Lisbon, and perhaps you've seen some of my wall decor pieces around here! Last year, I decided to try my hand at shirt embroidery, and I'm very proud and happy with the results! You can see the ones I've created so far here: https://imgur.com/gallery/sTI19XC I source tees locally here in my country from a supplier committed to sustainability. They are made from organic cotton, supporting family agriculture for ethical and eco-friendly production. I may not be taking down the fast fashion industry single-handedly, but every small step counts, right? The idea that I'm not contributing to H&M's CEO buying another diamond-encrusted toilet seat makes me happy! If someone wants to grab one, here's my Etsy shop: https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com Best wishes!
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

item.title: Learn the Alphabet with Arnie
item.dc:creator: DOcelot

item.title: Anime I think you should watch
item.description:
Heavenly Delusion I feel like a lot of people missed this one because it wasn't on the normal streaming platforms. If you're one of those people, be sure to check it out! Fifteen years ago, disaster struck human civilization, and now dangerous man-eating monsters roam the ravaged lands, posing an existential threat to the remaining survivors. Amid this turmoil, an isolated facility shelters children and nurtures them in peace. However, as a few among them find out about the world beyond the narrow periphery of their nursery's walls, their curiosity about it slowly grows. Meanwhile, in the outside world, young survivors Maru and Kiruko band together to search for a special place called Heaven, each for their own reasons. Carrying past burdens and tragic secrets, the two hope to find answers to the cruelty they have experienced in their lives and in the world, which still remains in tatters. Available on Hulu
Link Click This is a show that I feel went under the radar for lots of people, probably because its Chinese not Japanese, but is probably my absolute favourite of everything in this post. Two friends provide a special service: using their extraordinary powers that let them enter photographs, they jump into pictures brought to them by clients in order to grant their wishes. Through the eyes of the photographer, they live through the events surrounding the picture and try to decipher how to solve their client's request. Available on Crunchyroll
Diary of our Days at Breakwater This one is just adorable. If you want a break from the world, throw this on Introverted Hina Tsurugi is trying to adjust to her new school since moving from the countryside. And in spite of her unease around sea life, classmate Yuuki Kuroiwa somehow convinces her to join the Breakwater Fishing Club Available on Crunchyroll
Frieren: Beyond Journey's End This show follows Frieren, a near-immortal elf, after she and her companions defeat the Demon King and go back to their regular lives. She spends the next fifty years off exploring and learning more magic... while her former companions age and approach death. At the funeral of the first one to pass away, Frieren has the profound realization that her different relationship to time means that she barely knew him, despite having adventured with him for ten years. I fail to put into words just how fantastic this show is. Just watch it, please. Available on Crunchyroll
Summertime Rendering I still need to finish this one myself, but I've heard nothing but good things. Shinpei is a kind-hearted teenager who used to live on Hitogashima with the Kofune family after his parents' death, but moved away to Tokyo to become independent soon after. Returning to attend Ushio's funeral leads him down a path of dark secrets on the island. He discovers his ability to loop by dying Available on Hulu
Hell's Paradise I'll be honest, this show is pretty dang confusing, but the mystery of it all is kind of the point haha A squad of prisoners and their guards are sent to investigate a mysterious island. They get stranded there and must rely on each other to survive the island's mysterious and monstrous residents Available on Crunchyroll
Solo Leveling Y'all like power fantasy? Enjoy this one. Sung Jin-Woo is an E-rank hunter dubbed as the weakest hunter of all mankind. While exploring a supposedly safe dungeon, he and his party encounter an unusual tunnel leading to a deeper area. Enticed by the prospect of treasure, the group presses forward, only to be confronted with horrors beyond their imagination. Miraculously, Jin-Woo survives the incident and soon finds that he now has access to an interface visible only to him. This mysterious system promises him the power he has long dreamed of—but everything comes at a price. Available on Crunchyroll
Oshi No Ko This anime starts with what is basically an entire movie as its first episode. That movie is absolutely stunning too. Don't dismiss it as an idol anime. Sixteen-year-old rising star Ai Hoshino of pop idol group B Komachi has the world captivated; however, when she announces a hiatus due to health concerns, the news causes many to become worried. As a huge fan of Ai, gynecologist Gorou Amemiya cheers her on from his countryside medical practice, wishing he could meet her in person one day. His wish comes true when Ai shows up at his hospital—not sick, but pregnant with twins! While the doctor promises Ai to safely deliver her children, he wonders if this encounter with the idol will forever change the nature of his relationship with her. Available on HIDIVE
Josee and the Tiger Fish This one is a movie, but it's pretty cute so I had to include it here. Tsuneo is a university student, and Josee is a young girl who has rarely gone out of the house by herself due to her being unable to walk. The two meet when Tsuneo finds Josee's grandmother taking her out for a morning walk. Available on Crunchyroll
To Your Eternity The story of an immortal orb that becomes whatever it touches; it eventually becomes human and learns what life is. It's kind of a sad start, but that's what makes it so good IMO. Available on Crunchyroll
item.dc:creator: MartynMage
